overview: A fully functional e-commerce clothing store with product catalog, shopping cart, Stripe checkout, user accounts via Internet Identity, wishlist, order tracking, admin panel, FAQ, contact, and returns pages.
features: Product catalog with 16+ products across Men, Women, Kids, Accessories
Filtering by size, color, and price range with search suggestions
Shopping cart with quantity controls, taxes, and shipping estimate
Multi-step Stripe checkout with order confirmation
User login via Internet Identity with profile dashboard
Order history with Pending / Processing / Shipped / Delivered statuses
Fully functional admin panel to view and update all orders
FAQ with collapsible answers, Contact form, Returns policy page
Modern minimalist design with gold accent (#C9A96E) and responsive mobile-first layout
